rows.label: tev920201_MSG0010
rows.name:
For your convenience, I've just gone
and moved the shop and AM terminals
onto the New White Whale, haven't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev920201_MSG0020
rows.name:
I've even made a resource collection
system that mirrors FrontierNet,
so use that too, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev920201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Oh, and also! I hear you can now get
your Doll insurance renewed free of
charge! Wow, isn't that nice?[ST:wait ]
